criteria.name: headings_use_consistent_capitalization
criteria.description: Where the app renders headings and section titles (rail, panel, Export tabs), they use consistent capitalization throughout
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Rail and panel headings render in uppercase while the Export dialog heading and tabs use title case. Evidence: actions_specific_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: actions_use_specific_labels
criteria.description: Where the app renders button labels, they are specific verbs such as Send for signing, Duplicate field, Batch reassign, Export, Import, Copy, Download, Delete field — not generic Submit or OK when a specific label is possible
criteria.reasoning: Visible controls use specific labels such as Send for signing, Export template package, Import Template JSON, Copy, Download, and Import template. Evidence: actions_specific_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: errors_name_problem_and_fix
criteria.description: Where the app renders validation or Import errors, they name the problem field and the fix, not just Invalid
criteria.reasoning: The import validation message identifies the document/template JSON problem and tells the user to check JSON syntax. Evidence: errors_name_problem_and_fix-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_states_explain_next_step
criteria.description: Where the app renders an empty field set (zero count), the copy or summary explains the zero state and that the palette can add fields
criteria.reasoning: The zero-field template shows “0 fields” and the field palette copy instructs the user to add a field. Evidence: empty_states_explain_next_step-shared.png

criteria.name: body_copy_is_well_written
criteria.description: Where the app renders body or helper copy in the panel and Export, rate how free it is of spelling and grammatical errors
criteria.reasoning: Helper, panel, and Export copy is grammatical, clear, and free of observed spelling errors. Evidence: actions_specific_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: terminology_is_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders labels for template, field, and submitter in multiple places, terminology is consistent
criteria.reasoning: The UI consistently uses template, field, and submitter across the rail, canvas, properties panel, and Export surface. Evidence: actions_specific_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: numbers_dates_and_units_are_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders field counts and page counts, formatting is consistent across the rail and panel
criteria.reasoning: Field counts consistently use singular/plural wording, while pages consistently use formats such as “2 pages” and “Page 1 / 2.” Evidence: actions_specific_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: success_messages_are_specific
criteria.description: Where the app renders confirmation toasts, they state what happened (field added, exported, imported) rather than vague affirmations
criteria.reasoning: The visible confirmation toast states the concrete action: “Onboarding Packet opened.” Evidence: empty_states_explain_next_step-shared.png

criteria.name: placeholder_copy_is_visible
criteria.description: Lorem ipsum or placeholder text (TODO, Lorem, asdf, or template variable names such as {{title}}) is visible anywhere in the shipped UI chrome
criteria.reasoning: No Lorem ipsum, TODO, asdf, or template-variable placeholder text was visible in the rendered UI. Evidence: success_messages_are_specific-shared.png

criteria.name: prominent_copy_has_errors
criteria.description: Spelling or grammatical errors appear in prominent copy such as Docuseal chrome, Send for signing, or Export tabs
criteria.reasoning: No spelling or grammatical errors were observed in prominent Docuseal, Send for signing, or Export copy. Evidence: actions_specific_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: concept_names_are_inconsistent
criteria.description: The same concept is named inconsistently across rail, canvas, and panel (for example field vs box vs widget for the same object)
criteria.reasoning: The same concepts are consistently labeled as templates, fields, and submitters across the visible surfaces. Evidence: actions_specific_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: copy_is_truncated_or_overflowing
criteria.description: Truncated or overflowing text renders Export tab labels or validation copy unreadable
criteria.reasoning: Export labels, validation copy, and visible panel text rendered legibly without observed clipping or overflow. Evidence: errors_name_problem_and_fix-shared.png
